tiers.name: Friend
tiers.description: Help us keep tickets affordable and our doors open to every family who walks through them.

tiers.name: Supporter
tiers.description: Underwrite the scripts, sheet music, and rehearsal materials that bring a season to life.

tiers.name: Producer
tiers.description: Name a role: sponsor a scholarship, a costume budget, or a guest-artist visit.

tiers.name: Director's Circle
tiers.description: Our most committed supporters. Director's Circle gifts make multi-year programs possible — touring shows, capital projects, and the deepest scholarships.
